title: Vetala Dweller
description: You will be haunted by the horrific Vetala Dweller, a long critter that will appear in your world once every certain amount of time. Just a horror mod.
body:
When you install this mod, **Vetala Dweller** will begin to appear in your world, which will be hostile to you. I advise you to run away from him, because it is extremely difficult to kill him. By the way, you will also sometimes be startled by scary sounds.

![Vetala Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffe96a6df05e1a4a82c58d1000ceb06dabe57e23.png)

Listen to the moments when you go to bed. You may hear something strange...

[Dweller Trend]
